findings.detail: Tool description contains potential prompt injection pattern: "security_bypass"
findings.evidence: Modify an existing deposit. Can update date, memo, deposit account, department, and/or lines. CRITICAL for line changes: The QB Deposit API does NOT replace lines - it merges them. Lines WITH line_id
